@graph.name: Counterexample: preview incorrectly in hasPart
@graph.description: This RO-Crate INCORRECTLY includes ro-crate-preview.html in hasPart. In RO-Crate 1.2, ro-crate-preview.html SHOULD NOT be listed in hasPart of the Root Data Entity or any Dataset entity (unless it is also the profile description in a Profile Crate).

@graph.name: RO-Crate Preview
